name: Organic Workflow Orchestrator
description: Workflow Engine central do Organic Traffic OS

components.workflowBuilder: Construcao de workflows com sequencia, paralelismo e aprovacao
components.dagEngine: Directed Acyclic Graph com validacao de ciclos
components.conditionEngine: Suporte a IF, ELSE, WAIT, APPROVAL, RETRY, TIMEOUT, FAILOVER
components.transitionEngine: Controle de transicoes de estado validas
components.workflowMonitor: Monitoramento em tempo real de execucoes
